textByHash.00a57347d3137d794ad8cc3fdd1fb500d626b477: You must have a Hitpoints level of 25 before you may insure yourself.
textByHash.018035432b86b32ce784ecc2f72e9a9fa77e6334: Thank you. Your Hitpoints level will never decrease below 75 when you are defeated in future.
textByHash.032c7d05ab89eaa2150821bd89018bd34af916e7: I see you're insured up to level 50 Hitpoints - if you lose Hitpoints XP on death, you will never drop below level 50.
textByHash.0e89ff33cc0853ba79d9e8683dd4ca14905afd28: I can insure you up to level 25 Hitpoints, so that your Hitpoints level will never decrease below that. This service costs 25,000 coins.
textByHash.105182f2fabc95e1caa1ba0a511d7d74bb4e4a87: When you die, you may lose Hitpoints XP, so your Hitpoints level may decrease. I offer an insurance service, preventing your Hitpoints level from falling below a certain level.
textByHash.16df1f0e6116fb0d2cceec606f8e60f74b8f55ce: I cannot protect other skills, and I have no intention whatsoever of protecting anyone's items - a victor deserves their spoils.
textByHash.240e7492c99b8e8adbb14b167b318977fe1edefa: I used to sell life insurance, protecting people's Hitpoints XP when they died. Now there's no more need for that, so I'm just giving refunds now. But I don't think I owe you anything.
textByHash.254a724ee0de076cf8c86a361e35cca6e50cc4df: I see you're insured up to level 75 Hitpoints - if you lose Hitpoints XP on death, you will never drop below level 75. That's the highest level of insurance I offer.
textByHash.3512143a506dcd05f25392db0053c2e49bc5b4fa: Finally, I can insure you up to level 25 Hitpoints. That service costs only 25,000 coins.
textByHash.4e425d28469c9d0c3ded2b4aedf535cdd9722e01: I am Gelin, the greatest assassin ever to train in Al Kharid. If you have not heard of me, that is because my victims never live to speak of me.
textByHash.6e04a825d54d23d755fad7d4521925c83ed54d0b: Alternatively, I can insure you up to level 25 Hitpoints. That service costs only 25,000 coins.
textByHash.7146b03524e32c01f22af82819791f030bf3955b: They did not fear the pain, you understand. They feared the diminishment that comes with defeat.
textByHash.76d0abf215a19bcb108e24a6fcbc7f4beaf79794: Death is everywhere! At any moment, a band of brigands might rush in and kill you, or your closest friend might stab you in the back. Welcome to Gelin's Life Insurance Brokerage.
textByHash.7a65987a093f99e5e1505e598eccf71f72369556: Thank you. Your Hitpoints level will never decrease below 50 when you are defeated in future.
textByHash.7d6cc311b95fbecc38b11745f929fb3bd3576d0d: Thank you. Your Hitpoints level will never decrease below 25 when you are defeated in future.
textByHash.85bfe59fc9a3ab0b0d53c1f27cde66b1ee99748d: In my years as a warrior of fortune, I have fought in many lands, meeting fighters of all calibres, and I found they all had something in common:
textByHash.86592b01675abb13a02b31528bdeabd1ebea3d13: Alright. I don't pay interest, though!
textByHash.8d2192f2413f22ae3c3c7f43b89eb23d040df6b7: I insured your Hitpoints XP up to level . But now there's no more need for that, would you like a refund? It's coins.
textByHash.8e8a4afaf18dfdec42b153d59319a6f72c31fe2d: Alternatively, I can insure you up to level 50 Hitpoints. That service costs only 100,000 coins.
textByHash.92e06b499b2561099cf763c5e306ae2390b73440: I can insure you up to level 75 Hitpoints, so that your Hitpoints level will never decrease below that. This service costs 1,000,000 coins.
textByHash.982d2531773f9de5134c3e8a1732e57e32fdc78a: That is exactly the frame of mind that encourages people to buy life insurance from me.
textByHash.aea756b8169ac0462764b9b44d3aa54bd41b5297: I see you're insured up to level 25 Hitpoints - if you lose Hitpoints XP on death, you will never drop below level 25.
textByHash.aedad874aeb60b6b86c14d5e773c2f266dc605db: Every single one had a soul-gripping fear that they would suffer a humiliating defeat at the hands of their foes.
textByHash.c5be781e2cecba93dbc8130f43017d58814abc11: People don't lose experience when they die in this event, so no-one's buying life insurance from me. I may as well not be here!
textByHash.d5a1f13553f2e987ae3cd684a8ba1d5cc780abfd: There is no more fitting place! The graves of the dead remind the living that their lives are fragile, and that death is the inescapable fate of all mortals.
textByHash.dfc86a4ef4dfe030f4e77aa4370dca6b1fe36c18: You must have a Hitpoints level of 75 before you may insure yourself to that level.
textByHash.e54c948f4857e1a73938ab008d6cbaa5989a00be: You must have a Hitpoints level of 50 before you may insure yourself to that level.
textByHash.ed5f64482d6c62f6f475c3ab38b7a6cd7cbf9b7f: I can insure you up to level 50 Hitpoints, so that your Hitpoints level will never decrease below that. This service costs 100,000 coins.
textByHash.f29001db98fff8f03f8f35feaa5170490bc21ad0: No, my life insurance policies are for life. Similarly, when a customer upgrades their policy to a better one, I charge the full price of the new policy. They may take it or leave it.
textByHash.fe32bfcf45e609ce26ed2071f5da6b1b8b0a538c: Thus I was inspired to create this life insurance brokerage. I can protect your Hitpoints experience, so that you will not lose so much of it when you are defeated.
textByHash.ff3a97aaf6a6247e98e2606cb57bd624a5c777cc: To see one's wealth in the hands of another. To see one's skills decrease, as the hard-earned experience is lost. That is what they all feared.
